query_normalized: exploring the convergence of iterated function systems with non-contractive maps mathematics
rationale: The paper explicitly assumes a "contracting matrix" and analyzes properties of standard contractive iterated function systems, whereas the user's question specifically investigates the convergence of "Non-Contractive Maps." This represents a distinct mathematical construct and mechanism (standard contraction vs. non-contractive dynamics) rather than relevant prior work on the specific convergence behavior under non-contractive conditions.
